chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1603 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.7999/2023 2. For hearing of main case 24.02.2025 Chaudhry Sajjad Ali, advocate for the petitioner Qazi Abdul Haleem Siddiqui, Deputy Attorney General Learned counsel remains unable to demonstrate locus standi to maintain this petition as required to qualify in aggrieved persons per article 199 of Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan. Petition found to be misconceived, hence, the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
